channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: ‘Backstabbing comes naturally to them’: PM Modi attacks Congress over breaking alliance with DMK,
NDA leaders stake claim to form Assam government
item.description: Himanta Biswa Sarma was unanimously elected as the BJP Legislature Party leader, paving the way for him to take oath as the Chief Minister for a second successive term on May 12

item.title: Gelatin Sticks Found Near PM Modi's Convoy Route On Bengaluru Outskirts; Suspect Detained
item.description: The suspect had made threat calls earlier also but he was let off after it emerged that he was reportedly suffering from mental health issues.

item.title: Saudi Aramco Q1 profit jumps 26% as key pipeline reaches capacity amid Iran war
item.description: Aramco says its East-West pipeline has helped to mitigate the energy shock caused by the Iran war.

item.title: Mythos | Double-edged sword
item.description: The Anthropic AI model can not only identify vulnerabilities in cyberspace that humans may have missed, but also generate ways to exploit them, potentially even for non-experts

item.title: Iran war day 72: Tehran yet to reply to US plan; Israel bombs Lebanon - Al Jazeera
item.description: Iran war day 72: Tehran yet to reply to US plan; Israel bombs Lebanon Al Jazeera

item.title: AAP holds protests against BJP over ED action against Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora
item.description: The AAP leaders and volunteers burnt effigies of the BJP-led Centre and raised slogans against it. They were also carrying placards which read 'ED-BJP gathjod murdabad'

item.title: India's private capex jumps 67% to Rs 7.7 lakh crore in Sept 2025: CII unveils 5-point action plan
item.description: India's private capital expenditure has seen a significant jump. This indicates a strong revival in the country's investment cycle. Manufacturing is leading this growth. Services are also contributing substantially. The Confederation of Indian Industry has proposed a five-point agenda to support the economy. This includes measures for fuel excise, energy conservation, and MSME payments.

item.title: One year after Operation Sindoor: The threat landscape has not disappeared
item.description: India’s long-term credibility, both domestically and internationally, will depend not merely on asserting the existence of cross-border terrorism

item.title: Week in review: cPanel vulnerability actively exploited, DigiCert breach, LinkedIn job scams - Help Net Security
item.description: Week in review: cPanel vulnerability actively exploited, DigiCert breach, LinkedIn job scams Help Net Security

item.title: UK Joins India, South Asia & Germany Travelers to Flood UAE — Ajman’s Sports Tourism Strategy Triggers Record‑Breaking Emirates & Etihad Bookings, Massive Hotel Demand Surge Across Dubai, Abu Dhabi & Ajman - Travel And Tour World
item.description: UK Joins India, South Asia & Germany Travelers to Flood UAE — Ajman’s Sports Tourism Strategy Triggers Record‑Breaking Emirates & Etihad Bookings, Massive Hotel Demand Surge Across Dubai, Abu Dhabi & Ajman Travel And Tour World

item.title: China unable to repeat Puebla success as India win recurve women team gold at Shanghai - World Archery
item.description: China unable to repeat Puebla success as India win recurve women team gold at Shanghai World Archery

item.title: Archery World Cup 2026 Shanghai: Indian women’s recurve team stuns China to win gold medal - olympics.com
item.description: Archery World Cup 2026 Shanghai: Indian women’s recurve team stuns China to win gold medal olympics.com

item.title: US Awaits Iran Reply as Aramco Says Hormuz Opening No Quick Fix
item.description: The wait stretched on for Iran’s response to a US proposal to end 10 weeks of war, as the world’s largest oil company warned it would take months for the market to return to normal even if the Strait of Hormuz reopened immediately.

item.title: What Is Norovirus? Caribbean Princess Cruise Ship Outbreak Sparks Global Concern
item.description: A recent norovirus outbreak aboard the Caribbean Princess cruise ship has once again highlighted how quickly this highly contagious stomach virus can spread. Here's everything to know about norovirus, its symptoms, treatment, prevention and why cruis

item.title: Petrol, diesel prices today: How much does fuel cost in Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Bengaluru on 10 May
item.description: Petrol prices in India remain dynamic and updated daily at 6 AM based on global crude oil rates, taxes, and currency changes. As of today, rates vary across cities, with Delhi around ₹94–95/litre and Mumbai near ₹103/litre, reflecting stable pricing despite global oil volatility.

item.title: Maternal Health Beyond Childbirth: Doctor Explains Long-Term Care And Awareness Gaps
item.description: Long-term care for mothers after childbirth extends far beyond the immediate postpartum recovery period. It plays an important role in safeguarding physical, mental, and emotional well-being.

item.title: Sensex to hit 3 lakh by 2036? Raamdeo Agrawal says India is the 'Ferrari' among markets, here's why
item.description: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Chairman Raamdeo Agrawal said India remains one of the world’s best markets for long-term wealth creation despite global uncertainties and AI-led shifts. Speaking at the Groww India Investor Festival 2026, he highlighted India’s strong compounding story, rising financialisation and potential for generating multibagger stocks.

item.title: LPG gas cylinder price on 10 May: Check domestic and commercial cooking gas rates in New Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru today
item.description: LPG cylinder prices in India remained steady on 10 May despite slight adjustments. Ongoing global supply disruptions are impacting fuel costs, but the government continues to shield consumers from significant price increases amid rising international energy costs.

item.title: After Hantavirus Fears, Over 100 Fall Sick In Caribbean Cruise Norovirus Outbreak
item.description: Princess Cruises described it as "mild gastrointestinal illness".

item.title: 'Congress Stabbed DMK In The Back': PM Modi Attacks TVK Alliance Politics In Tamil Nadu
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi accused the Congress of “betraying” the DMK after decades of alliance, alleging that the party abandons allies whenever political equations change.

item.title: Indian stock market: How are Sensex and Nifty 50 likely to perform next week amid US-Iran war uncertainty? - Mint
item.description: Indian stock market: How are Sensex and Nifty 50 likely to perform next week amid US-Iran war uncertainty? Mint

item.title: Chinese Consulate General in Kolkata issues renewed warning against unintentional Nepal-India border crossings - Global Times
item.description: Chinese Consulate General in Kolkata issues renewed warning against unintentional Nepal-India border crossings Global Times

item.title: Psychologist Explains Why Mothers Experience Burnout, Stress And Emotional Fatigue
item.description: Indian mothers can experience burnout, stress and emotional fatigue if they don't recieve support

item.title: HC protects MP Shashi Tharoor's personality rights, directs removal of deepfake video
item.description: The Delhi High Court has protected Congress MP Shashi Tharoor's personality rights. The court ordered X to remove an AI-generated deepfake video showing him praising Pakistan. It also restrained the misuse of his name, image, and voice for any purpose. Meta was asked to keep certain Instagram reels inaccessible. This order safeguards Tharoor's reputation and India's international standing.

item.title: 10 smallcap stocks soaring up to 116% in FY27. Do you own them?
item.description: Markets have shown recovery since April, with small-cap stocks significantly outperforming benchmarks. Several smallcap gainers have recorded substantial rallies, driven by factors like strong demand, strategic appointments, and positive regulatory developments.

item.title: "Parasite, Backstabber": PM Modi Tears Into Congress For Ditching DMK
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi attacked the "backstabber" Congress party which is an ally of Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), with an acerbic swipe over abandoning its longtime friend, DMK

item.title: Iraq Announces New Oil Discovery at Al-Qarnain Block - Egypt Oil & Gas
item.description: Iraq Announces New Oil Discovery at Al-Qarnain Block Egypt Oil & Gas

item.title: Saudi Arabia joins India and Indonesia to Spark Spiritual Tourism Surge: Somnath Temple Leads 2026’s Top Pilgrimage Spots – Discover How Emirates & Air India Are Bracing for Record-Breaking Crowds! - Travel And Tour World
item.description: Saudi Arabia joins India and Indonesia to Spark Spiritual Tourism Surge: Somnath Temple Leads 2026’s Top Pilgrimage Spots – Discover How Emirates & Air India Are Bracing for Record-Breaking Crowds! Travel And Tour World

item.title: Saudi Aramco reports higher profits despite Iran war
item.description: East-west pipeline allows oil company to circumvent the Strait of Hormuz and keep pumping

item.title: 'Congress misleading people by supporting govt in Tamil Nadu': PM Modi addresses rally in Bengaluru
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed a large gathering in Bengaluru, inaugurating and laying the foundation for projects worth Rs 9,500 crore. He highlighted recent electoral victories in Puducherry, Assam, and Bengal, alongside Gujarat's local election success, as historic milestones. The visit also includes dedicating Sindhu Hospital to the nation.

item.title: Dozens killed in jihadist attacks in central Mali
item.description: Jihadist fighters launched a fresh wave of deadly attacks in central Mali that killed dozens of people, local and security sources said on Saturday. One local official said the latest attacks brought the death toll to more than 70 in recent days, as Islamist armed groups intensify assaults on villages across the region.

item.title: 3 Indian nationals injured in UAE's Fujairah as Iran launches fresh missile, drone attack - MSN
item.description: 3 Indian nationals injured in UAE's Fujairah as Iran launches fresh missile, drone attack MSN

item.title: Operation Sindoor anniversary: This day that year - How Sensex, Nifty reacted to India's tri-service military prowess - MSN
item.description: Operation Sindoor anniversary: This day that year - How Sensex, Nifty reacted to India's tri-service military prowess MSN

item.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Coforge and NBCC on Monday for near-term gains of up to 7%
item.description: The Nifty ended sharply lower amid escalating US-Iran tensions, rupee weakness and heavy selling in financial stocks, slipping below the 50-day EMA and signalling renewed weakness. Analysts expect further downside if the index remains below 24,200, while Coforge and NBCC (India) are seen as attractive short-term trading opportunities.

item.title: Virus-hit cruise ship arrives in Tenerife as medics await passengers
item.description: The BBC's Sarah Rainsford reports from Tenerife where the MV Hondius has arrived, after a deadly hantavirus outbreak.

item.title: Gustavo Petro Warns Fossil-Fueled Crypto Mining Will Trigger 'Climate Collapse' - Bitcoin News
item.description: Gustavo Petro Warns Fossil-Fueled Crypto Mining Will Trigger 'Climate Collapse' Bitcoin News

item.title: The price India paid for abandoning Iran - MR Online
item.description: The price India paid for abandoning Iran MR Online

item.title: Iran State-Linked Hackers Hid Espionage Campaign Behind Chaos Ransomware - Israel Defense
item.description: Iran State-Linked Hackers Hid Espionage Campaign Behind Chaos Ransomware Israel Defense

item.title: Which sectors saw the biggest FII inflows and outflows in April?
item.description: Foreign investors remained net sellers of Indian equities in April, though the pace of outflows eased sharply from March. FIIs turned buyers in sectors such as power, capital goods and metals, while financial services, healthcare, oil & gas and automobiles continued to witness heavy selling pressure amid global uncertainty.
